examples.title: Fetch JSON into the page
examples.description: Purpose: Modern sites load data from JSON files or APIs using fetch()—faster and simpler than older XHR code. Output: Click Load posts to fetch three blog titles from a JSON file and list them. Try: Run with npx serve . from the project folder, then click the button.

practice.description: Parse this JSON array and list each name in the page.
